items.title: MTech Thesis — Adversarial Robustness & Uncertainty Estimation in Object Detection
items.note: Exploring Monte Carlo Dropout and conformal prediction for flagging adversarial/OOD inputs in real-time detection pipelines.

items.title: Inventory Demand Forecasting with Uncertainty Quantification
items.note: Extending conformal prediction intervals and anomaly detection on M5 dataset. LightGBM vs XGBoost vs LSTM comparison.
